suspected_issue: X-Forwarded-* spoofing accepted by default in core server startup
evidence: BaseServerStartup.defaultChannelConfig explicitly sets allowProxyHeadersWhen=NEVER; StripUntrustedProxyHeadersHandler removes X-Forwarded-* when policy is NEVER.
guard: Default secure config strips proxy headers unless explicitly overridden by integrator

suspected_issue: WebSocket unauthenticated message processing in sample push protocol
evidence: SampleWebSocketPushClientProtocolHandler checks isAuthenticated() and immediately closes unauthenticated connections with protocol error 1007 before handling text/binary frames.
guard: Authentication gate in channelRead prevents message processing pre-auth
